hallucination.rationale: The generated note is entirely a thinking/planning process and does not contain a completed clinical note. There is no actual output to evaluate for hallucination, but the failure to produce a note is a fundamental problem.

instruction_following.rationale: The output is a massive internal thinking process/planning document rather than a completed clinical note. The instructions required returning ONLY the completed note, and no actual note was produced.

completeness.rationale: No completed clinical note was generated. While the thinking process references transcript content, no actual documentation was produced.
missed_items: Entire clinical note is missing - no actual output was generated, only a thinking/planning process

template_adherence.rationale: No structured clinical note was produced. The output is an unstructured thinking process that repeatedly loops through template sections without generating actual content.

entity_marking.rationale: No entity marking was applied in any completed note since no note was actually generated.

duplication.rationale: The thinking process contains extreme duplication, with the same template section analysis repeated dozens of times in an apparent loop.
